'''Holmar Grahrk''' was a [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]], and, like his cousin [[Vilmarh Grahrk|Vilmarh]] was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and all-round criminal.

==Biography==
Holmar would later team up with Villie to collect the bounty on [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] during his search for his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]]. Holmar and Vilmarh lured Quinlan to the [[Floating Rock Gardens of Ryloth|Floating Rock Gardens]], where Holmar made an attempt on his life; however, before he could fire his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], he took a blaster bolt to the chest from his cousin Vilmarh, who had been hiding behind a nearby boulder.
